html:
Exclusive to:

Blubber is an item in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is used to craft Blubber Suits and Windbreakers. Hacking a fully bloated Blue Whale Carcass or White Whale Carcass will drop 2 to 6 Blubber. Blubber cannot be Cooked or used in a Crock Pot. When eaten, it grants 10 Health, and 10 Hunger.

It can also be fed to a caged Bird to obtain a fresh Egg, used as Fuel, offered to Bottlenose Ballphins to befriend them, or fed to live Wobsters in the inventory to keep them from dying.

Blubber is an item in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is used to craft Blubber Suits and Windbreakers. Hacking a fully bloated Blue Whale Carcass or White Whale Carcass will drop 2 to 6 Blubber. Blubber cannot be Cooked or used in a Crock Pot. When eaten, it grants 10 Health, and 10 Hunger.
It can also be fed to a caged Bird to obtain a fresh Egg, used as Fuel, offered to Bottlenose Ballphins to befriend them, or fed to live Wobsters in the inventory to keep them from dying.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Blubber là một vật phẩm trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó được sử dụng để chế tạo Bộ quần áo Blubber và Áo gió. Hack một Xác Cá Voi Xanh hoặc Xác Cá Voi Trắng đã căng phồng hoàn toàn sẽ rơi ra từ 2 đến 6 Blubber. Blubber không thể nấu hoặc sử dụng trong Nồi Hầm. Khi ăn, nó mang lại 10 Máu và 10 Sức Đói.

Just what every gal needs. |choose=wickerbottom}} '''Blubber''' is an [[item]] in the ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is used to craft [[Blubber Suit]]s and [[Windbreaker]]s. [[Machete|Hacking]] a fully bloated [[Blue Whale|Blue Whale Carcass]] or [[White Whale|White Whale Carcass]] will drop 2 to 6 Blubber. Blubber cannot be [[Cooking|Cooked]] or used in a [[Crock Pot]]. When eaten, it grants 10 [[Health]], and 10 [[Hunger]]. It can also be fed to a [[Birdcage|caged Bird]] to obtain a fresh [[Egg]], used as [[Fire#Shipwrecked|Fuel]], offered to [[Bottlenose Ballphin|Bottlenose Ballphins]] to befriend them, or fed to live [[Wobster|Wobsters]] in the inventory to keep them from dying. =={{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage== {{Recipe |item=Blubber |tool=Birdcage |result=Egg}} {{Recipe |item=Blubber |result=Octopus Chest |tool=Yaarctopus Icon}} {{Recipe |item1=Blubber |count1=4 |item2=Cloth |count2=2 |item3=Palm Leaf |count3=2 |result=Blubber Suit |tool=Alchemy Engine}} {{Recipe |item1=Blubber |count1=2 |item2=Cloth |count2=1 |item3=Rope |count3=1 |result=Windbreaker |tool=Alchemy Engine}} {{clear}} {{Food and Edible Items}} [[Category:Mob Dropped Items]] [[Category:Non-Flammable]] [[Category:Fuel]] [[Category:Perishables]] [[Category:Healing]]
